productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Kobe Comic Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, short sleeves and a combination of screen print and rubber print on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degree C Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean nike pays a humble tribute to Basketball legend Michael Jordan with this t-shirt. This is one fabulous opportunity to pay tribute to this iconic sportsman by slipping into his tee and taking the world by storm. Pair it with Jordan sneakers from nike and jeans for a great sporty look.
